list.name: tenant
list.label: Tenant

query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT tenant FROM flows ORDER BY tenant

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT tenant FROM flows ORDER BY tenant

list.name: zone
list.label: Zone

query.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT zone FROM flows ORDER BY zone

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT zone FROM flows ORDER BY zone

targets.rawSql:
SELECT timestamp AS time, sum(bytes) * 8 / $bucket AS bps
FROM samples(ival = $bucket) WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(flowLocality = '$locality', $locality) AND lastSwitched >= $__fromTime AND deltaSwitched <= $__toTime + INTERVAL $bucket SECOND
  AND timestamp < toStartOfInterval(now(), toIntervalSecond($bucket))
GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT sum(bytes) AS total FROM flows WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(flowLocality = '$locality', $locality)

SELECT count() AS flows FROM flows WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(flowLocality = '$locality', $locality)

WITH top AS (SELECT srcAs AS dim FROM flows WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(flowLocality = '$locality', $locality) GROUP BY dim ORDER BY sum(bytes) DESC LIMIT 10)
SELECT timestamp AS time,
       if(srcAs IN (SELECT dim FROM top), concat(toString(srcAs), ': ', ifNull(srcAsOrg, 'unknown')), 'Other') AS series,
       sum(bytes) * 8 / $bucket AS bps
FROM samples(ival = $bucket)
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(flowLocality = '$locality', $locality) AND lastSwitched >= $__fromTime AND deltaSwitched <= $__toTime + INTERVAL $bucket SECOND
GROUP BY time, series
ORDER BY time

WITH top AS (SELECT dstAs AS dim FROM flows WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(flowLocality = '$locality', $locality) GROUP BY dim ORDER BY sum(bytes) DESC LIMIT 10)
SELECT timestamp AS time,
       if(dstAs IN (SELECT dim FROM top), concat(toString(dstAs), ': ', ifNull(dstAsOrg, 'unknown')), 'Other') AS series,
       sum(bytes) * 8 / $bucket AS bps
FROM samples(ival = $bucket)
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(flowLocality = '$locality', $locality) AND lastSwitched >= $__fromTime AND deltaSwitched <= $__toTime + INTERVAL $bucket SECOND
GROUP BY time, series
ORDER BY time

WITH top AS (SELECT srcAddr AS dim FROM flows WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(flowLocality = '$locality', $locality) GROUP BY dim ORDER BY sum(bytes) DESC LIMIT 10)
SELECT timestamp AS time,
       if(srcAddr IN (SELECT dim FROM top), ifNull(srcAddrHostname, replaceOne(toString(srcAddr), '::ffff:', '')), 'Other') AS series,
       sum(bytes) * 8 / $bucket AS bps
FROM samples(ival = $bucket)
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(flowLocality = '$locality', $locality) AND lastSwitched >= $__fromTime AND deltaSwitched <= $__toTime + INTERVAL $bucket SECOND
GROUP BY time, series
ORDER BY time

WITH top AS (SELECT dstAddr AS dim FROM flows WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(flowLocality = '$locality', $locality) GROUP BY dim ORDER BY sum(bytes) DESC LIMIT 10)
SELECT timestamp AS time,
       if(dstAddr IN (SELECT dim FROM top), ifNull(dstAddrHostname, replaceOne(toString(dstAddr), '::ffff:', '')), 'Other') AS series,
       sum(bytes) * 8 / $bucket AS bps
FROM samples(ival = $bucket)
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(flowLocality = '$locality', $locality) AND lastSwitched >= $__fromTime AND deltaSwitched <= $__toTime + INTERVAL $bucket SECOND
GROUP BY time, series
ORDER BY time

WITH top AS (SELECT ifNull(application, 'unclassified') AS dim FROM flows WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(flowLocality = '$locality', $locality) GROUP BY dim ORDER BY sum(bytes) DESC LIMIT 10)
SELECT timestamp AS time,
       if(ifNull(application, 'unclassified') IN (SELECT dim FROM top), ifNull(application, 'unclassified'), 'Other') AS series,
       sum(bytes) * 8 / $bucket AS bps
FROM samples(ival = $bucket)
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(flowLocality = '$locality', $locality) AND lastSwitched >= $__fromTime AND deltaSwitched <= $__toTime + INTERVAL $bucket SECOND
GROUP BY time, series
ORDER BY time

WITH top AS (SELECT concat(transform(protocol, [1, 2, 6, 17, 41, 47, 50, 51, 58, 89, 132], ['ICMP', 'IGMP', 'TCP', 'UDP', 'IPv6', 'GRE', 'ESP', 'AH', 'IPv6-ICMP', 'OSPFIGP', 'SCTP'], concat('proto-', toString(protocol))), '/', toString(dstPort)) AS dim FROM flows WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(flowLocality = '$locality', $locality) GROUP BY dim ORDER BY sum(bytes) DESC LIMIT 10)
SELECT timestamp AS time,
       if(concat(transform(protocol, [1, 2, 6, 17, 41, 47, 50, 51, 58, 89, 132], ['ICMP', 'IGMP', 'TCP', 'UDP', 'IPv6', 'GRE', 'ESP', 'AH', 'IPv6-ICMP', 'OSPFIGP', 'SCTP'], concat('proto-', toString(protocol))), '/', toString(dstPort)) IN (SELECT dim FROM top), concat(transform(protocol, [1, 2, 6, 17, 41, 47, 50, 51, 58, 89, 132], ['ICMP', 'IGMP', 'TCP', 'UDP', 'IPv6', 'GRE', 'ESP', 'AH', 'IPv6-ICMP', 'OSPFIGP', 'SCTP'], concat('proto-', toString(protocol))), '/', toString(dstPort)), 'Other') AS series,
       sum(bytes) * 8 / $bucket AS bps
FROM samples(ival = $bucket)
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(flowLocality = '$locality', $locality) AND lastSwitched >= $__fromTime AND deltaSwitched <= $__toTime + INTERVAL $bucket SECOND
GROUP BY time, series
ORDER BY time

WITH top AS (SELECT transform(protocol, [1, 2, 6, 17, 41, 47, 50, 51, 58, 89, 132], ['ICMP', 'IGMP', 'TCP', 'UDP', 'IPv6', 'GRE', 'ESP', 'AH', 'IPv6-ICMP', 'OSPFIGP', 'SCTP'], concat('proto-', toString(protocol))) AS dim FROM flows WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(flowLocality = '$locality', $locality) GROUP BY dim ORDER BY sum(bytes) DESC LIMIT 10)
SELECT timestamp AS time,
       if(transform(protocol, [1, 2, 6, 17, 41, 47, 50, 51, 58, 89, 132], ['ICMP', 'IGMP', 'TCP', 'UDP', 'IPv6', 'GRE', 'ESP', 'AH', 'IPv6-ICMP', 'OSPFIGP', 'SCTP'], concat('proto-', toString(protocol))) IN (SELECT dim FROM top), transform(protocol, [1, 2, 6, 17, 41, 47, 50, 51, 58, 89, 132], ['ICMP', 'IGMP', 'TCP', 'UDP', 'IPv6', 'GRE', 'ESP', 'AH', 'IPv6-ICMP', 'OSPFIGP', 'SCTP'], concat('proto-', toString(protocol))), 'Other') AS series,
       sum(bytes) * 8 / $bucket AS bps
FROM samples(ival = $bucket)
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(flowLocality = '$locality', $locality) AND lastSwitched >= $__fromTime AND deltaSwitched <= $__toTime + INTERVAL $bucket SECOND
GROUP BY time, series
ORDER BY time

WITH top AS (SELECT exporterAddr AS dim FROM flows WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(flowLocality = '$locality', $locality) GROUP BY dim ORDER BY sum(bytes) DESC LIMIT 10)
SELECT timestamp AS time,
       if(exporterAddr IN (SELECT dim FROM top), exporterAddr, 'Other') AS series,
       sum(bytes) * 8 / $bucket AS bps
FROM samples(ival = $bucket)
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(flowLocality = '$locality', $locality) AND lastSwitched >= $__fromTime AND deltaSwitched <= $__toTime + INTERVAL $bucket SECOND
GROUP BY time, series
ORDER BY time

WITH top AS (SELECT concat(exporterAddr, ' - ', ifNull(inputSnmpIfName, concat('if', toString(inputSnmp))), if(inputSnmpIfAlias IS NULL, '', concat(' (', inputSnmpIfAlias, ')'))) AS dim FROM flows WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(flowLocality = '$locality', $locality) GROUP BY dim ORDER BY sum(bytes) DESC LIMIT 10)
SELECT timestamp AS time,
       if(concat(exporterAddr, ' - ', ifNull(inputSnmpIfName, concat('if', toString(inputSnmp))), if(inputSnmpIfAlias IS NULL, '', concat(' (', inputSnmpIfAlias, ')'))) IN (SELECT dim FROM top), concat(exporterAddr, ' - ', ifNull(inputSnmpIfName, concat('if', toString(inputSnmp))), if(inputSnmpIfAlias IS NULL, '', concat(' (', inputSnmpIfAlias, ')'))), 'Other') AS series,
       sum(bytes) * 8 / $bucket AS bps
FROM samples(ival = $bucket)
WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(flowLocality = '$locality', $locality) AND lastSwitched >= $__fromTime AND deltaSwitched <= $__toTime + INTERVAL $bucket SECOND
GROUP BY time, series
ORDER BY time

WITH top AS (SELECT srcAs AS dim FROM flows WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(flowLocality = '$locality', $locality) GROUP BY dim ORDER BY sum(bytes) DESC LIMIT 10),
     intDiv(toUnixTimestamp($__toTime), $bucket)
       - intDiv(toUnixTimestamp($__fromTime) + $bucket - 1, $bucket) + 1 AS nBuckets,
     arrayResize(groupArray(bps), greatest(nBuckets, length(groupArray(bps))), 0.) AS padded
SELECT series AS "Src AS",
       arrayMin(padded) AS "Min", arrayMax(padded) AS "Max", argMax(bps, time) AS "Last",
       arrayAvg(padded) AS "Average", arrayReduce('quantile(0.95)', padded) AS "95th",
       sum(bucket_bytes) AS "Total"
FROM (
    SELECT timestamp AS time, concat(toString(srcAs), ': ', ifNull(srcAsOrg, 'unknown')) AS series,
           sum(bytes) * 8 / $bucket AS bps, sum(bytes) AS bucket_bytes
    FROM samples(ival = $bucket)
    WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND $__conditionalAll(tenant IN (${tenant:singlequote}), $tenant) AND $__conditionalAll(zone IN (${zone:singlequote}), $zone) AND $__conditionalAll(flowLocality = '$locality', $locality) AND lastSwitched >= $__fromTime AND deltaSwitched <= $__toTime + INTERVAL $bucket SECOND AND srcAs IN (SELECT dim FROM top)
      AND timestamp < toStartOfInterval(now(), toIntervalSecond($bucket))
    GROUP BY time, series
)
GROUP BY series
ORDER BY "Average" DESC
